zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Learned於1684年3月11日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆時，她的父親Isaac Learned II28歲，母親Sarah Bigelow24歲。她於1706年7月與John Gleason在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她於1684年住在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可黑爾波恩。她去世於1765年11月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Learned于1684年3月11日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆时，她的父亲Isaac Learned II28岁，母亲Sarah Bigelow24岁。她于1706年7月与John Gleason在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她于1684年住在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可黑爾波恩。她去世于1765年11月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Learned
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Leonard  . An intermediate stage in this change is   Learnard  . Compare   Larned  .

History: William Learned was admitted to the First Church in Charlestown, MA, in 1632, and in 1640 was one of the first settlers of Woburn, MA. One of his better known descendants, Ebenezer, a revolutionary war officer, was born at Oxford, MA, in 1728.

variants.name: Leonard
meanings: English; French (Léonard); Walloon (mainly Léonard): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements leo ‘lion’ (a late addition to the vocabulary of ancient Germanic name elements, taken from Latin) + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, which was taken to England by the Normans. A Christian saint of this name, who is supposed to have lived in the 6th century, but about whom nothing is known except for a largely fictional life dating from half a millennium later, was popular throughout Europe in the early Middle Ages and was regarded as the patron of peasants and horses. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Leonardo , Polish, Slovenian, etc. Lenart or Lenard , and probably also their derivatives. Compare Larned , Learned , and Yenor .
Irish (Fermanagh): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Fhionáin or of Langan .
German: variant of   Leonhard  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Larned
meanings: Variant of   Learned  , itself an altered form of English   Leonard  .

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Learned was born on 11 March 1684, in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Isaac Learned II, was 28 and her mother, Sarah Bigelow, was 24. She married John Gleason in July 1706, in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She lived in Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States in 1684. She died on 5 November 1765, in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Learned est née le 11 mars 1684, à Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Isaac Learned II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sarah Bigelow, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Gleason en juillet 1706, à Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle a vécu à Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1684. Elle est décédée le 5 novembre 1765, à Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Learned am 11. März 1684 in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Isaac Learned II 28 und ihre Mutter Sarah Bigelow 24. Sie hat im Juli 1706 in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Gleason geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1684 hat sie in Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 5. November 1765 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Learned è nata il il 11 marzo 1684 nel Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Isaac Learned II, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Sarah Bigelow, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Gleason nel luglio 1706, nel Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1684. Morì il 5 novembre 1765, nel Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 81 anni.

イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスフラミンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Learnedが1684年3月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスフラミンガムで生まれた時，父Isaac Learned IIは28歳，母Sarah Bigelowは24歳であった。1706年7月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスフラミンガムでJohn Gleasonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1684年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスシェルボルンに住んでいた。彼女は1765年11月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスフラミンガムで81歳で死去した。

ko.Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 셔본

ko.Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함
ko.Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함
ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Learned(이)가 1684년 3월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Isaac Learned II(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Bigelow(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1706년 7월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함에서 John Gleason(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1684년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 셔본에서 살았다. 그녀는 1765년 11월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Learned nasceu em 11 de março de 1684, em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Isaac Learned II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Bigelow, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Gleason em julho de 1706, em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela viveu em Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1684. Ela faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1765, em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Learned родилась 11 марта 1684 г. в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Isaac Learned II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Bigelow, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gleason июль 1706 г. в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она жила в местности ширборн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1684 году. Она умерла 5 ноября 1765 г. в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Learned nació el 11 de marzo de 1684, en Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Isaac Learned II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sarah Bigelow, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Gleason en julio de 1706, en Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Sherborn, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1684.
